gaps: Live kind endpoint smoke was not run in this review environment; verification used rendered kustomize plus no-spend/static fixture checks.

summary: Final review accepts round-20260509t213633z-native3-integration for update-web-app. The prior blockers are repaired: the web app is represented as a first-class control-plane health dependency, Kubernetes normalization and snapshot readiness now degrade on missing web app Deployment/Service/pod/Endpoint, web app RBAC grants read-only access to deployments, pods, services, PVCs, and endpoints, and the smoke/task lifecycle includes the web app endpoint and narrow update/status/log/smoke paths. Verification passed: OpenSpec validation, web app fixture tests, rendered control-plane kustomize containing web app Deployment/Service/RBAC, git diff --check, and task verify. No blocking issues remain; PR is ready.
